Home / Services / Door Installation

Door Installation

Secure and beautify your home with our professional door installation services.

Red Oak Home Exteriors provides expert door installation services to Oklahoma City homeowners. A properly installed door not only enhances your home's curb appeal but also provides security and energy efficiency. We install entry doors, patio doors, and storm doors, ensuring a perfect fit and weather-tight seal.

Our team is experienced in working with a variety of door materials, including wood, fiberglass, and steel. We'll help you choose the right door for your needs and budget, considering factors such as style, security, and energy efficiency. We pay close attention to detail during installation, ensuring that your door operates smoothly and provides lasting protection.

We also offer door repair services, addressing issues such as sticking, squeaking, and air leaks. Whether you need a new door installed or an existing door repaired, Red Oak Home Exteriors is here to help. Given Oklahoma City's exposure to severe weather, we can advise on storm-rated doors and reinforcement options to protect your home.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Schedule a consultation to discuss your door installation needs.
  2. 02 Step 2: Select the perfect door from our wide range of styles and materials.
  3. 03 Step 3: Our skilled technicians will install your new door with precision and care.
  4. 04 Step 4: Enjoy enhanced security, energy efficiency, and curb appeal.

Benefits

  • Enhanced security
  • Improved energy efficiency
  • Increased curb appeal
  • Weather protection

Frequently Asked Questions

What type of door is best for security?

Steel doors are the most secure option for entry doors. They are resistant to forced entry and provide excellent protection against intruders.

How can I improve the energy efficiency of my door?

Choose a door with a high insulation value and weather stripping to prevent air leaks. Also, consider installing a storm door for added protection.

Do you install custom doors?

Yes, we can install custom doors to fit your specific needs and preferences. Contact us to discuss your custom door project.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with door installation? Contact us today.
